style: Premium dark fantasy MP orb matching the Image2 command belt: blackened iron, tarnished brass, dark sapphire glass. No SVG.

ontology.clause: ONTOLOGY ACTIVE: MP resource orb must match the command belt material language while remaining instantly readable.

prompt: Create one circular MP resource orb for a Diablo-like dark fantasy ARPG bottom HUD. The orb must visually match a gothic Image2 command belt: blackened iron claw frame, tarnished brass rim, dark carved stone outer ring, deep sapphire blue liquid glass center, worn metal scratches, restrained premium fantasy material. Square 512x512 PNG on pure black outside background so the parent runner can cut the outside alpha. No embedded text, no MP letters, no numbers, no icons, no character, no watermark. Avoid old plastic glossy sphere, red HP color, cyan sci-fi UI, white shine streaks, flat vector, SVG look, cartoon UI, beige paper.
acceptance: Circular blue MP orb with blackened iron and brass frame.
No embedded text, numbers, icons, or character.
Matches the command belt material language.
